The villa

Ondine

A sculptural three-level villa on the water's edge at Kodra e Diellit, Lalzit Bay. Floor-to-ceiling glazing opens the living level to a private canal and the Adriatic beyond, while wraparound terraces and a landscaped garden frame the coastline — designed for those who want the sea as a permanent address. Arranged over basement, ground and first floors, with three bedrooms.

Explore the villa

Walk it, level by level

Basement, ground and first floors. Move between levels and tap any room to see its size.

Location & setting

On the water at Turquoise Marina

Turquoise Marina at Kodra e Diellit is one of Lalzit Bay's most sought-after seafront addresses — a network of private canals opening onto the Adriatic, minutes from the bay's beaches and moments from Tirana's airport. Ondine sits directly on the water, with the sea as a permanent address.

Private canal frontage
Three living levels + basement
Wraparound terraces & garden
Standalone seafront villa
